positive: A whimsical, abstract depiction of a mountain cityscape at sunset. The design features stylized, geometric mountains merging into a futuristic, clean-lined cityscape silhouette. Dominant colors are deep indigo, burnt orange, pastel lavender, and cream. The composition is centered and balanced, emphasizing clean curves and sharp contrasts. Style is a mix of mid-century modern graphic design and delicate ethereal line art. Perfect for a high-contrast screen print on apparel. Crisp, solid color blocks and smooth gradient transitions. Trending on concept art and tattoo flash sheets.
